---
title: "3.idk - RBM Test"
output: html_document
---

# Cell 1: Setup and Data

```{r}
set.seed(9054)
library(R.ROSETTA)
library(caret)

og_positions <- read.csv("data/clean/positions.csv")
cat("Data:", nrow(og_positions), "rows x", ncol(og_positions), "cols\n")
cat("Classes:", paste(names(table(og_positions$class)), table(og_positions$class), sep="=", collapse=", "), "\n")

train_idx <- createDataPartition(og_positions$class,
                                  p = 0.8,
                                  list = FALSE)

train_data <- og_positions[train_idx, ]
test_data  <- og_positions[-train_idx, ]

cat("Train data:", nrow(train_data), "rows x", ncol(train_data), "cols\n")
cat("Test data:", nrow(test_data), "rows x", ncol(test_data), "cols\n")

# Verify class distribution in train and test sets
cat("Classes in Train:", paste(names(table(train_data$class)), table(train_data$class), sep="=", collapse=", "), "\n")
cat("Classes in Test:", paste(names(table(test_data$class)), table(test_data$class), sep="=", collapse=", "), "\n")

# Write CSVs with the split data
write.csv(train_data, "data/clean/train_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(test_data, "data/clean/test_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
best_johnson_param <- list(
    Modulo = TRUE,
    BRT = TRUE,
    BRTprec = 0.7,
    Precompute = FALSE,
    Approximate = TRUE,
    Fraction = 1
)

cat("Final Model\n")
ros_final <- rosetta(train_data,
    reducer = "Johnson",
    JohnsonParam = best_johnson_param,
    reducerDiscernibility = "Object",
    discrete = TRUE,
    classifier = "StandardVoter",
    underSample = FALSE,
    roc = TRUE,
    clroc = "Human")

rules_final <- ros_final$main
quality <- ros_final$quality

rec_og <- recalculateRules(train_data, rules_final, discrete=TRUE)
rec <- rec_og[rec_og$pValue <= 0.05, ]
recmax <- rec_og[rec_og$pValue <= 0.01, ]

cat("Johnson - Number of rules_final:", nrow(rules_final), "\n")
print(quality)
plotMeanROC(ros_final)
```

# Significant rules_final
```{r}
sig_rules <- rules_final[rules_final$pValue < 0.05, ]
cat("Significant rules_final (p < 0.05):", nrow(sig_rules), "/", nrow(rules_final), "\n\n")
tabS <- table(sig_rules$decision)
print(tabS)
for (cls in levels(train_data$class)) {
  pct <- tabS[cls] / sum(rules_final$decision == cls) * 100
    cat("% significant for class", cls, ":", round(pct, 1), "%\n")
}
rec_rules <- recalculateRules(train_data, rules_final, discrete=TRUE)
```

# Load test data and predict
```{r}
test_data$class <- as.factor(test_data$class)

truth <- test_data[, "class"]
test_features <- subset(test_data, select = -class)

pred <- predictClass(test_features, rec, discrete = TRUE, validate = TRUE, defClass = truth)

library(caret)
RBM_pred <- factor(pred$out$predictedClass, levels = levels(truth))
cm <- confusionMatrix(RBM_pred, truth)
print(cm)
```

# Export test predictions CSV

This cell is for building some comparison matrices and such from a python notebook.
So by exporting a CSV with all the predictions, I can re-construct the metrics.

```{r}
# Reload the original test CSV with all columns intact
test_full <- og_positions[-train_idx, ]

# Add RBM predictions
test_full$RBM_pred <- as.integer(pred$out$predictedClass)

write.csv(test_full, "data/double_predicted_test.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved", nrow(test_full), "rows to data/double_predicted_test.csv\n")
cat("Columns:", paste(names(test_full), collapse=", "), "\n")
```
